news.headline: RxSight, Inc. reports preliminary Q1 2025 revenue and revised full-year guidance, to host conference call on April 3 at 8:00 a.m. ET.
news.summary: Aliso Viejo, California-based RxSight, Inc. (NASDAQ: RXST), a company specializing in personalized vision solutions post-cataract surgery, shared an update on their financials. They disclosed initial revenue findings for Q1 2025 and adjusted their full-year 2025 outlook. To delve deeper into these results, they scheduled a conference call for April 3, 2025, at 8:00 a.m. EST.

news.headline: HYTN receives GMP certificates for US, Bermuda, and Israel. Cannabis manufacturer's facility in Kelowna, Canada is compliant.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on April 02, 2025, HYTN Innovations Inc. (CSE: HYTN, FSE: 85W0, OTC PINK: HYTNF), a leading pharmaceutical-grade cannabis producer, has obtained digital Good Manufacturing Practices (GMP) certificates from Health Canada for its manufacturing plant in Kelowna. These certificates, granted under the company's Drug Establishment Licence (DEL), validate HYTN's compliance with GMP standards for the United States, Bermuda, and Israel.

news.headline: Report: Former NY Governor Andrew Cuomo advised OKX during $505M federal probe, helping them plead guilty to violations and pay fines.
news.summary: Former New York Governor Andrew Cuomo has reportedly been hired by cryptocurrency exchange OKX to advise them on a federal probe. OKX recently pled guilty to violations and agreed to pay $505 million in fines. Cuomo provided legal advice to OKX on responding to the investigation, which found them guilty of operating an unlicensed money-transmitting business and violating US Anti-Money Laundering laws. Despite a policy blocking US persons from trading on their platform since 2017, the breaches occurred from 2018 to 2024. Cuomo also influenced OKX to appoint his friend, Linda Lacewell, to their board of directors. OKX plans to enhance its compliance program after the probe, aiming to become a global leader in regulatory compliance. Cuomo, currently running for mayor of New York City, has been offering legal services to various clients post his governorship.

news.headline: Biotech stocks drop due to tariff uncertainty, Trump imposed 20% tariff on goods from Europe. Exemption chances questioned.
news.summary: The biotech sector experienced a sharp decline on Wednesday following President Trump's announcement of widespread global tariffs, notably imposing a 20% tariff on European goods. This news caused uncertainty within the industry, with investors questioning whether biotech stocks will receive any exemptions from these tariffs. The market response was negative with a significant drop in biotech stock prices.

news.headline: Israeli-American philanthropist Adam Milstein publishes white paper on Jewish philanthropy amid rising antisemitism.
news.summary: In Los Angeles on April 2, 2025, Adam Milstein, a well-known Israeli-American philanthropist and strategic venture philanthropist, released a significant white paper titled "The Strategic Imperative: Transforming Jewish Philanthropy for an Era of Global Challenges." This document introduces new approaches and ideas aimed at shaping the future of Jewish philanthropy in response to current global challenges. The publication marks a key milestone in Milstein's work and outlines innovative strategies for philanthropic initiatives moving forward.

Mesoblast seeks FDA meeting for accelerated approval pathway for Revascor® in treating ischemic heart failure.
news.summary: In New York on April 02, 2025, leading biotech company Mesoblast (Nasdaq:MESO; ASX:MSB) shared details concerning its upcoming meeting with the United States Food and Drug Administration (FDA). The primary agenda is to deliberate on fast-tracking the approval process for Revascor® (rexlemestrocel-L) to treat individuals with ischemic chronic heart failure featuring reduced ejection fraction (HFrEF) alongside inflammation. Mesoblast continues its pioneering work in allogeneic cellular medicines targeted at inflammatory conditions.

news.headline: Trump has implemented reciprocal tariffs on various countries according to Bloomberg, details included.
US Trade Rep report lists trade barriers potentially triggering tariffs by President this week.
news.summary: A report issued by the Office of the United States Trade Representative has brought attention to foreign trade barriers that may impact the tariffs expected to be implemented by the president this week. This report sheds light on the challenges posed by such barriers and underscores the significance of addressing them in the realm of international trade. The information outlined in the report will play a crucial role in shaping the upcoming decisions regarding tariffs and trade policies. It is essential for policymakers to consider these findings in order to make informed decisions that promote fair and effective trade practices. This report serves as a key resource in guiding discussions and actions related to trade, highlighting the need for proactive measures in tackling trade barriers.

ThreeD Capital Inc. cancels upcoming annual and special meeting of shareholders scheduled for April 22, 2025.
news.summary: On April 2, 2025, ThreeD Capital Inc. announced the cancellation of its Annual and Special Meeting of Shareholders, scheduled for April 22, 2025 at 11:00am in Toronto. ThreeD, a Canadian venture capital firm specializing in investments in junior resources and disruptive technologies, made this decision. The company is listed as CSE:IDK and OTCQX:IDKFF.

news.headline: US short-term interest-rate futures rise: traders see nearly equal chances of a fourth Federal Reserve rate cut this year, versus previous pricing for 3 cuts
EY updates privacy tech with Nightfall_4, a ZK rollup on Ethereum, easing fears post Tornado Cash sanctions. Fast finality, simplified operations, and enhanced security for corporate clients.
news.summary: Big Four accounting firm EY has upgraded its enterprise-focused Ethereum layer-2 blockchain Nightfall to a zero-knowledge rollup design. The new source code, named "Nightfall_4," offers near-instant transaction finality and simplifies the network’s architecture. This change aims to make the platform more user-friendly and efficient, eliminating the need for a challenger node in securing the network. This switch enables faster transaction finality compared to the previous optimistic rollup-based version. The move is EY's fourth major update to Nightfall since its launch in 2019. The upgrade follows the easing of US sanctions, making corporate clients more comfortable with privacy solutions. The open-source Nightfall code remains a permissioned blockchain for EY’s customer base, competing with other blockchain platforms like Hyperledger Fabric and R3 Corda. EY's blockchain team aims to streamline their ecosystem to support payments, logic, and composability. The shift to ZK-rollup model enhances privacy and security, catering to the growing demand for efficient and secure blockchain solutions.

news.headline: ISG Australia certified as 'Great Place to Work' for 4th year by Great Place To Work® Institute.
news.summary: ISG, based in Stamford, Connecticut, has been recognized for the fourth consecutive year by the Great Place To Work® Institute for its Australian business, receiving the prestigious “Great Place to Work Certification™.” This certification highlights ISG's commitment to providing a positive employee experience in Australia.

news.headline: Accounting firm EY updates Ethereum scaler Nightfall to ZK-rollup for faster transaction finality in its fourth major update. Supply chain tracking with OpsChain, challenging competitors such as Hyperledger Fabric.
news.summary: Ernst & Young, now known as EY, has revamped its enterprise-focused blockchain Nightfall to a zero-knowledge rollup design on Ethereum for faster transaction finality. The new source code, “Nightfall_4,” simplifies architecture and increases user accessibility. Users no longer need to challenge incorrect transactions, leading to immediate finality upon inclusion in a Nightfall block. This update marks the fourth major one since Nightfall’s launch in 2019, offering privacy, scaling, and a streamlined structure. It aims to facilitate token transfers at a lower cost than Ethereum’s base network and mitigate counterparty risk using verified identities. Nightfall is open source on GitHub but remains permissioned for EY’s clients. The platform collaborates with EY’s OpsChain for supply chain tracking in finance, logistics, and manufacturing. Competitors include Hyperledger Fabric, R3 Corda, and Quorum.

news.headline: New mobile app HiTouch in Seoul measures happiness, aiming to improve mental health care and prevent depression as companies increase related services.
news.summary: In Seoul, South Korea, on April 3, 2025, there has been a notable rise in companies offering mental health care and depression prevention services in response to the growing emphasis on these issues in society. One such company is HiTouch, which has introduced a new mobile application designed to measure happiness. This increase in mental health care providers is a result of the heightened awareness and importance placed on mental well-being.

news.headline: BLUETTI partners with Leave No Trace for sustainable outdoor adventures, promoting responsible recreation with clean energy.
news.summary: BLUETTI, in partnership with Leave No Trace, is focused on promoting responsible outdoor activities by incorporating strong ESG principles. This initiative involves providing education and training programs that emphasize innovative clean energy solutions. The collaboration aims to address the pressing issues of climate change. This development was announced on April 2, 2025, in Las Vegas.

news.headline: Canva and Google partner to bring creativity to classrooms with Google for Education integration, empowering teachers and students.
news.summary: Canva and Google recently announced their partnership, presenting the Google for Education app licensing integration for Canva for Education. This collaboration allows school and district administrators to efficiently deploy Canva through Google Workspace for Education. Teachers and students can now access Canva with ease, enhancing classroom creativity. This integration streamlines the process, offering a seamless experience for educators and learners.

news.headline: Acceleware Ltd. (TSX-V: AXE) announced Q4 2024 financial results for the year ended Dec 31, 2024, focusing on RF heating and HPC technologies. Website and SEDAR have detailed info.
news.summary: Acceleware® Ltd., a key player in transformative technologies for industrial process heat decarbonization, disclosed its financial and operational performance for the year concluding on December 31, 2024. The company, listed on TSX-V as AXE, reported results in Canadian dollars. The outcomes were driven by two primary business segments: radio frequency ("RF") heating leveraging the proprietary Clean Tech Inverter ("CTI") for industrial use, notably in enhanced oil recovery ("RF XL"), and scientific high-performance computing ("HPC"). It is imperative to review the audited financial statements, accompanying notes, and management's discussion and analysis ("MDA") pertaining to the year ended December 31, 2024, available on Acceleware’s website and www.sedarplus.ca.

news.headline: Lupaka Gold Corp. receives update on Arbitration Claim against Peru. TSX-V: LPK.344 characters
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on April 02, 2025, Lupaka Gold Corp. disclosed an update on their Arbitration Claim against the Republic of Peru. The company, listed as Lupaka on the TSX-V (LPK) and FRA (LQP), confirmed receiving information from the Arbitral Tribunal.
